{"credits": [], "cve_id": null, "cvss": {"score": 9.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 9.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-122", "name": "Heap-based Buffer Overflow"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-787", "name": "Out-of-bounds Write"}], "description": "## Duplicate Advisory
This advisory has been withdrawn because it is a duplicate of GHSA-5rff-8f7c-8jmw. This link is maintained to preserve external references.

## Original Description
Multiple out-of-bounds write vulnerabilities exist in the ORCA format nAtoms functionality of Open Babel 3.1.1 and master commit 530dbfa3. A specially-crafted malformed file can lead to arbitrary code execution. An attacker can provide a malicious file to trigger this vulnerability.The loop that stores the coordinates does not check its index against nAtoms", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-wj42-v2p3-fq2w", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-01T17:50:04Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-wj42-v2p3-fq2w", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-wj42-v2p3-fq2w"}], "nvd_published_at": "2023-07-21T21:15:10Z", "published_at": "2023-07-21T21:30:32Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2022-46290", "https://talosintelligence.com/vulnerability_reports/TALOS-2022-1665", "https://www.talosintelligence.com/vulnerability_reports/TALOS-2022-1665", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-wj42-v2p3-fq2w"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "critical", "source_code_location": "", "summary": "Duplicate Advisory: Open Babel has out-of-bounds write in ORCA nAtoms parser (second variant)", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-01T17:50:05Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-wj42-v2p3-fq2w", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "3.2.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "openbabel"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 3.2.0"}], "withdrawn_at": "2026-07-01T17:50:04Z"}
